news.headline: EDM superstar Steve Aoki to headline INFINITY Florida party at SBC Summit Americas in Fort Lauderdale, April 2, 2025.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, the closing party of INFINITY Florida will be headlined by renowned EDM artist and Grammy nominee, Steve Aoki. This event marks the debut of INFINITY Florida at the SBC Summit Americas, where Aoki will showcase his talent. Aoki is a global icon in the EDM scene, having garnered acclaim for his innovative contributions to the genre. The event is expected to draw a large crowd, including industry professionals and EDM enthusiasts, making it a prominent highlight of the summit.

news.headline: Siemens acquires Dotmatics for $5.1 billion to enhance AI-powered software in life sciences, expanding PLM portfolio.
news.summary: Siemens has acquired Dotmatics, a prominent company in Life Sciences R&D software, for a substantial $5.1 billion. This move significantly bolsters Siemens' already strong presence in industrial software, especially in the field of AI-powered Product Lifecycle Management (PLM). The acquisition enables Siemens to extend its portfolio into Life Sciences, facilitating seamless connectivity from research and development to manufacturing processes.

news.headline: US Senate budget resolution includes a reserve fund to save more than $2 trillion in spending.
NSC urges action during Distracted Driving Awareness Month to prevent preventable crashes causing deaths.
news.summary: Preventable accidents resulting from distracted driving persist as a major threat to road safety in the United States. The latest data reveals that distracted driving continues to be a primary factor in a significant number of avoidable fatalities on American roads. In an effort to address this issue, the National Safety Council is urging drivers to prioritize their focus while behind the wheel. As part of Distracted Driving Awareness Month this April, the NSC is emphasizing the importance of safe driving practices to combat this alarming trend.

news.headline: Roche stock down after Phase 3 trial of Ocrevus high dose in RMS patients didn't show added benefit in disability progression.
news.summary: Roche Holdings AG recently shared data from the MUSETTE Phase 3 trial involving a high dose of Ocrevus (ocrelizumab) intravenous infusion in adult patients with relapsing multiple sclerosis (RMS). The study compared the high dose of Ocrevus to the currently approved Ocrevus IV 600 mg dose, with patients receiving treatment every 24 weeks for a minimum of 120 weeks. Unfortunately, the trial did not achieve its primary goal of demonstrating additional benefit in slowing disability progression over the 120-week period. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Under Trump’s proposal, TikTok America would be roughly 50% owned by new US investors, and license TikTok’s algorithm from Bytedance - The Information.
BioMarin's Phase 3 trial shows positive results for Palynziq in adolescents with PKU. Study had 55 participants aged 12-17.
news.summary: BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc. reported results from the Phase 3 PEGASUS trial which compared Palynziq (pegvaliase-pqpz) to diet alone in 55 adolescents aged 12-17 with phenylketonuria (PKU). PKU is a rare genetic disorder that hinders the breakdown of the amino acid phenylalanine, potentially causing brain damage, intellectual disabilities, behavioral symptoms, or seizures if left untreated. The primary focuses of the trial were the alterations in blood Phe concentration and evaluation of safety in adolescents. Secondary objectives included changes in total dietary protein intake. This study's findings and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump to announce new tariffs; potential for 20% on imports. US had $1.2 trillion trade deficit in 2024, with major partners like China and Mexico. Markets on edge for details.
news.summary: President Donald Trump is set to announce new trade tariffs to address the US trade deficit with major global partners. The tariffs, reportedly as high as 20%, could raise average US tariffs to levels unseen in decades and create uncertainty in global supply chains and financial markets. The US trade deficit in 2024 was over $1.2 trillion, with monthly deficits reaching record highs in early 2025. Key import sources for the US include Mexico, China, Canada, Germany, and the European Union. The announcement is expected to provide more details on the tariffs and potential diplomatic and economic responses.

news.headline: US Senate Republicans release a budget resolution with instructions for enacting the Trump agenda.
US Senator Graham releases a Senate budget proposal.
OmniTRAX appoints Colby Tanner from BNSF Railway as CEO to accelerate North American expansion efforts.
news.summary: Executive Colby Tanner from BNSF Industrial Products has joined OmniTRAX CEO Dean Piacente to drive the expansion of the rail network in North America. The announcement was made in Denver on April 2, 2025. OmniTRAX Inc., a rail and real estate affiliate of The Broe Group, has appointed Tanner for this key role. The move aims to leverage Tanner's experience from BNSF Railway, focusing on sales and marketing strategies to enhance the rail network's growth. This partnership indicates a significant step in OmniTRAX's plans for expansion within North America.

news.headline: My Green Mattress's Earth Day Sale: 15% off sustainable sleep essentials from April 4-23, 2025.
news.summary: To mark Earth Day 2025, My Green Mattress is promoting accessible sustainability by offering a discount. Starting from April 4 until April 23, customers can enjoy a 15% reduction on a range of eco-friendly products including organic mattresses and bedding. This initiative aims to encourage more people to make environmentally conscious choices.

news.headline: NY Governor Cuomo consulted with OKX on navigating US investigation into its operations.
Orezone Gold completes private placement with Nioko, raising significant funds.
news.summary: The latest data indicates a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the country. Over the past week, there have been a total of 50,000 new reported cases, bringing the national total to 300,000 confirmed cases. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety protocols such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, hospitals are reporting a surge in admissions, with 5,000 new patients requiring treatment in the last three days. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to contain the outbreak.

news.headline: Linda Goler Blount steps down as head of Black Women's Health Imperative after leading since 2014; Michelle Minus Swittenberg and Lisa Cunningham named interim co-presidents.
news.summary: The Black Women's Health Imperative recently announced that Linda Goler Blount, who has been the organization's leader since 2014, will be stepping down to pursue a new leadership position at Community Catalyst. In her place, Michelle Minus Swittenberg and Lisa Cunningham will serve as interim co-presidents. This transition took place on April 2, 2025 in Atlanta, marking a significant change in leadership for the organization.

news.headline: HBAR Foundation & OnlyFans founder's app Zoop to bid on TikTok in US. Bid submitted to Trump admin with others like Amazon & Microsoft. Potential sale deadline extended to April 5 after law passed by US Congress in 2024.
news.summary: Zoop and the HBAR Foundation, led by OnlyFans founder Tim Stokely, have submitted a bid to purchase TikTok in the US, joining other major tech companies like Amazon, Oracle, and Microsoft. The bid aims to keep TikTok's services running for US users after legislation threatened to ban the app due to concerns about its connection to its Chinese parent company, ByteDance. The deadline for the sale of TikTok under the law was initially Jan. 19 but was extended to April 5 by former President Donald Trump. The potential acquisition is seen as an opportunity to create a new model where creators and communities benefit directly from the platform's value. The collaboration between Zoop, HBAR Foundation, and their bid for TikTok aims to reshape ownership to benefit all stakeholders. Further updates on the situation will be provided as they become available.

news.headline: Insights from 2025 McKinsey American Opportunity Survey highlight Gen Z's work struggles, Goodwill releases report.
news.summary: New data from the 2025 McKinsey American Opportunity Survey indicates that Generation Z is highly motivated to succeed. The report, titled Closing the Opportunity Gap and published by Goodwill Industries International in ROCKVILLE, Md. on April 2, 2025, reveals key findings about the aspirations of young individuals. This survey highlights the significant interest among Gen Z in advancing their careers and seizing opportunities for growth. The insights from this report shed light on the ambitions of the younger generation, emphasizing their desire to excel and make progress in their professional lives.

news.headline: PerZeption Inc appoints T. Orion Wilmerding as CTO to enhance visual assessments and help prevent vision loss.
news.summary: Boston-based company PerZeption Inc. has recently appointed T. Orion Wilmerding as its new Chief Technology Officer (CTO). The U.S. vision diagnostics startup aims to prevent vision loss through innovative visual psychophysics solutions. This change in leadership signifies the company's commitment to advancing its technological capabilities in this field.

news.headline: Keel and Westinghouse suppliers back AP1000 projects globally, meet with U.S. Congress.
news.summary: Suppliers of Keel and Westinghouse recently gathered in Washington to engage with the U.S. Congress in advocating for AP1000® projects worldwide. The meeting aimed to bolster support for these initiatives on a global scale.

news.headline: File before April 15 to maximize tax refund with lesser-known deductions and credits, experts advise.
news.summary: As the deadline for filing taxes with the IRS looms on April 15, it is advised by experts to submit your returns promptly. By doing so, you may potentially increase your refund by taking advantage of various deductions and credits available. It is important to act quickly to ensure you don't miss out on any opportunities to maximize your refund.

news.headline: Allied will hold a conference call on May 1, 2025, to discuss Q1 financial results released on April 30, 2025.
news.summary: Toronto-based Allied Properties Real Estate Investment Trust, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol AP.UN, is set to conduct a conference call and live audio webcast at 10:00 a.m. (ET) on Thursday, May 1, 2025. The call aims to analyze the financial outcomes for the quarter ended March 31, 2025. The official release of these results is scheduled for Wednesday, April 30, 2025, following the market closure.

news.headline: Hawaiian Springs Water production levels surpass pre-receivership numbers for the first time post-reopening. #HawaiiWater #milestone
news.summary: In Hilo, Hawaii on April 2, 2025, Hawaiian Springs Water, a premium natural artesian water company sourced from the Big Island of Hawaii, shared a major achievement. After reopening under new leadership, the company has surpassed a milestone by achieving a significant operational success. This development marks a notable moment in the company's journey.

news.headline: Renewable energy industry prepares for impact of tariffs imposed by Trump administration.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.9%, the lowest in the past five years. The report also states that the economy added 250,000 jobs last month, surpassing expectations. This surge in job creation has been attributed to the booming technology and healthcare sectors. Additionally, the average hourly earnings have increased by 3.2% from the previous year, marking a positive trend in wage growth. Experts predict that if this momentum continues, the economy is likely to experience further improvements in the upcoming months.

news.headline: The House-passed budget allowed $4t debt limit increase, The Senate budget would allow up to $5t debt limit increase.
Toll Brothers opens amenity center at Regency at Babcock Ranch in Punta Gorda for 55+ community with resort-style features.
news.summary: A newly revealed resort-style amenities package at an exclusive community designated for those aged 55 and older features a range of appealing additions. Residents can now enjoy a variety of top-tier offerings, totaling in at least 10, encompassing fitness centers, swimming pools, and recreational areas. This enhancement is likely to significantly elevate the community's attractiveness to prospective residents seeking a luxury lifestyle tailored for older individuals.

news.headline: Norfolk Southern (NYSE: NSC) to announce Q1 2025 earnings on April 23, 2025, via conference call and webcast.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Norfolk Southern Corporation (NYSE: NSC) revealed plans to unveil their financial results for the first quarter of 2025 through a live conference call and internet webcast at 8:45 a.m. ET on Wednesday, April 23, 2025. The quarterly earnings report will be made public before the event.

news.headline: Pepe Coin trades sideways, down 0.5% at $0.057623 with a market cap of $3.2 billion. Analysts predict a breakout.
news.summary: Pepe's (CRYPTO: PEPE) is currently experiencing a sideways trading pattern on Wednesday, with analysts predicting a potential significant breakout in the near future. The cryptocurrency is currently priced at $0.057623 with a market capitalization of $3.2 billion. Over the past 24 hours, Pepe has seen a slight decrease of 0.5%, while over the last 7 days, it has dropped by 11.7%.Comparatively, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is trading at $0.1729 with a market cap of $25.7 billion, experiencing a 0.7% decrease in the last 24 hours and an 11.4% decline over the past week. On the other hand, Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is priced at $0.00001263 with a market cap of $7.4 billion. It has seen a 0.6% dip in the last 24 hours and a significant 13.4% decrease over the previous week.Crypto trader Jameson has expressed positivity towards Pepe's chart performance, indicating potential bullish movement. Meanwhile, MaxBecauseBTC also holds a positive outlook on Pepe's future trajectory. For more detailed information, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Senator McCormick bought up to $600K in Bitcoin ETF after selling $1M in Goldman Sachs stock, possibly related to future BTC price increase.
news.summary: Senator David McCormick has made a significant investment in the Bitwise Bitcoin ETF, potentially banking on a rise in the value of Bitcoin following President Trump's friendly stance towards cryptocurrency and talks of a Bitcoin Strategic Reserve. McCormick initially bought between $65,000 and $150,000 in shares of the ETF, and has now made additional purchases totaling $50,000 on February 27th. Trump's support for cryptocurrency led to record highs for Bitcoin, with potential plans for a Strategic Reserve further fueling optimism for increased BTC value. McCormick's latest investment indicates his confidence in the future price of the leading cryptocurrency.

news.headline: Weight management company in discussions with creditors for potential change in ownership as debts reach critical levels.
NANO Nuclear, University of Illinois agree to build KRONOS MMR™ research reactor, starting construction prep for deployment.
news.summary: The site has been chosen for the upcoming construction of NANO Nuclear's microreactor, marking a significant step towards deployment. Preparatory work is set to commence soon in preparation for submitting the construction permit application. With this progress, NANO Nuclear is accelerating towards their goal of deploying the microreactor.

news.headline: Ruko launches U11MINI 4K Triple Battery Combo drone, under 250g, 8K photos, 4K videos, 96-min flight time.
news.summary: A new mini pocket drone weighing under 250g has been unveiled, capable of capturing 8K photos and shooting 4K videos at 30 frames per second. The drone comes with three batteries, providing a total flight time of 96 minutes. It also boasts professional stabilization features. Ruko, based in Hong Kong, has revealed the launch of its U11MINI 4K Triple Battery Combo for global pre-orders on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: Company's Restricted Share Unit Programs offer $1 million in incentives to top executives and $500K to middle managers.
Brent Crude futures settle at $74.95/bbl, up 46 cents, 0.62%.
Trump predicts end of Elon Musk's White House role, prompting rally in defense stocks, Tesla, and SpaceX rivals.
news.summary: President Trump allegedly indicated that Elon Musk's White House position will end shortly. This news led to a surge in defense stocks, with competitors of SpaceX and Tesla experiencing significant gains. The potential departure of Musk has caused a rally among these companies, including Tesla and defense contractors.

news.headline: President Trump unveils reciprocal tariffs at 4 p.m. ET on 'Liberation Day'. S&P 500 whipsaws amidst uncertainty.
news.summary: At 4 p.m. ET, President Trump introduced "reciprocal" tariffs. Meanwhile, uncertainty surrounds the impact of "Liberation Day." The S&P 500 experienced volatile swings in response. This event occurs as a Senate vote challenges the GOP.

news.headline: Discover recognized as a 2025 CIO 100 Award Winner for Risk Reduction Model using Generative AI; 30 years of CIO 100 awards.
news.summary: Discover, based in Riverwoods, Illinois, has been honored as a recipient of the prestigious 2025 CIO 100 award for its GenAI system, aimed at aiding customer care representatives in determining the most suitable method and timing for reaching out to clients according to their preferences. This innovative solution not only enhances customer service but also minimizes the company's risk exposure. The CIO 100 awards, established almost three decades ago, acknowledge global organizations showcasing remarkable strategic and operational IT prowess. Discover's recognition exemplifies its commitment to leveraging advanced technology, benefitting both its clients and its operational efficiency.

news.headline: Nubis breaks through with Nitro™ Linear Redriver, expanding 4m reach for 200Gbps Copper Cables in AI networks.
news.summary: An announcement from New Providence, N.J., reveals that Nubis has expanded its linear optics technology to redriver chips designed for 4 meters long Amphenol Communications Solutions (ACS) ACC cables. This development is targeted at AI scale-up networks.

news.headline: FDA approves AstraZeneca's Imfinzi for bladder cancer patients. 32% reduction in disease progression shown in Phase 3 trial.
news.summary: The FDA has given the green light to AstraZeneca Plc's Imfinzi (durvalumab) along with gemcitabine and cisplatin for neoadjuvant treatment, followed by Imfinzi as adjuvant monotherapy after radical cystectomy for adults dealing with muscle-invasive bladder cancer (MIBC). This approval follows positive results from the NIAGARA Phase 3 trial, where the Imfinzi-based perioperative regimen displayed a significant 32% risk reduction in disease progression, recurrence, not undergoing surgery, or death compared to the standard treatment arm. For more details on AstraZeneca's Imfinzi-based regimen and the FDA approval, visit the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Linda B. Laul named CEO of ADAPT Community Network following passing of former CEO Edward R. Matthews.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, ADAPT Community Network announced Linda B. Laul as its new Chief Executive Officer, succeeding Edward R. Matthews following his recent passing. Laul previously served as the Chief Operating Officer of the non-profit organization. ADAPT is known for its work supporting individuals with disabilities.

news.headline: Eric Trump supports Hut 8's new Bitcoin mining venture, aiming to scale quickly, mine Bitcoin affordably, and grow their crypto presence for a future public listing.
news.summary: The company aims to rapidly expand its operations, focusing on low-cost Bitcoin mining to increase the family's presence in the cryptocurrency market before a possible initial public offering.

news.headline: SEC and Gemini request 60-day halt in $900M crypto lending case amid regulatory pullback during Trump administration.
news.summary: A recent development in the financial sector involves the request to halt the Gemini v. SEC case, which reflects a larger trend of regulatory relaxations during the Trump administration. This move comes after similar situations involving Coinbase and Ripple. This signals a shift in regulatory approaches within the industry.

news.headline: Bybit closes NFT marketplace amid industry trend, joining others as interest fades in digital assets.
news.summary: The NFT sector, previously a hub for digital speculation, is currently experiencing a decline as notable platforms like Bybit are stepping back.

news.headline: Florida candidates Patronis and Fine, backed by crypto super PAC, secure key seats as part of GOP's push for crypto laws.
news.summary: A wide range of cryptocurrency super PACs have provided significant support, resulting in two additional victories for the GOP in Florida. These wins have strengthened the party's already narrow majority in the House. The purpose behind these victories is to push forward with upcoming cryptocurrency legislation.

news.headline: Sony Singapore now accepts USDC payments through Crypto.com, hinting at more crypto additions.
news.summary: Payments using USDC, a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar, can now be made on Sony's Singapore store. The introduction of USDC as a payment option indicates a potential move towards incorporating other cryptocurrencies in the future. This development reflects the growing acceptance of digital currencies in mainstream commerce.

news.headline: North Korean IT workers found in European Solana projects, according to Google Threat Intelligence.
news.summary: According to a new report from Google Threat Intelligence, North Korean IT professionals have been involved in cryptocurrency projects in the European Union and the United Kingdom. The report highlights concerns over the potential threat posed by these individuals, indicating that their involvement in these projects could have significant implications. The precise number of North Korean IT workers involved and the extent of their activities in the EU and UK have not been disclosed, but the report underscores the importance of monitoring and addressing such risks in the cryptocurrency sector.

news.headline: Ted Cruz presents FLARE Act to convert flared gas for Bitcoin mining, aiming to boost TX as top Bitcoin mining spot.
news.summary: A new bill introduced by a Texas Senator aims to reduce emissions from lower atmosphere sources and position the state as the top destination for Bitcoin mining. This initiative seeks to attract more mining operations by offering favorable conditions and environmental regulations. The bill is designed to capitalize on the growing interest in cryptocurrencies, particularly Bitcoin, by creating a welcoming environment for miners in Texas. If passed, the bill could significantly boost the state's mining sector and attract a large number of investors.

news.headline: EP 19 of UNDER EXPOSED covers Circle IPO, OpenAI, HYPE and key market updates with hosts TylerD, Deeze, Geebz & Peter. Tune in live Tuesdays 12-1 PM EST on YouTube and X.
news.summary: Tune in to UNDER EXPOSED for in-depth coverage of the most significant macro news of the week affecting crypto and broader markets. Featuring hosts TylerD, Deeze, Geebz, and Peter Jennings, the show delves into the latest trends, trades, and narratives in the crypto and NFT sectors. Gain insights into what influences market movements, as well as the hosts' current investment strategies. Catch the live stream every Tuesday from 12:00 PM EST to 1:00 PM EST on YouTube and X.

news.headline: Bitcoin price remains stable before Trump's 'Liberation Day' jobs report. Tariff reversal likely as markets seek clarity. Expert predicts.
news.summary: An expert predicts that a reversal on tariffs is highly likely due to the need for clarity in the markets. This statement was made in a trading note on Wednesday.

news.headline: Alabama and Minnesota advance plans for Bitcoin reserve with companion bills; Alabama has set eligibility criteria currently met only by Bitcoin.
news.summary: In Minnesota's recent proposal, Bitcoin is specifically mentioned, while in Alabama, eligibility criteria are established that can only be met by Bitcoin at the moment.

news.headline: Nintendo Switch 2 to debut in June with 'Mario Kart World'. Details on release and new games revealed by Nintendo.
news.summary: The release date for the highly anticipated Nintendo Switch 2 has been revealed by Nintendo. The company has provided details about the new console as well as upcoming games.
